scenario.title: Open in chat from PR inbox item and Discuss in chat from review mode
steps: Open the inbox and locate a PR awaiting review item
Click the 'Open in chat' action on the PR item
Verify a chat session opens with a PR reference card showing number, title, verdict, risk, author, and link
Open a PR in review mode
Verify review mode exits and a chat session opens with a PR reference card

assertions.description: PR inbox item shows 'Open in chat' action
Clicking 'Open in chat' creates a chat session with a PR reference card
PR reference card displays PR number, title, verdict chip, risk level, author, repo, and clickable link
Review mode overlay shows 'Discuss in chat' button
Clicking 'Discuss in chat' exits review mode and opens a chat session with PR reference card
PR reference card is persisted in transcript and survives reload

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Open in chat from PR inbox item and Discuss in chat from review mode

⚠️ Automated screenshot capture was blocked (browser MCP unavailable). Manual verification steps:

1. Open the inbox and locate a PR awaiting review item
2. Click the 'Open in chat' action on the PR item
3. Verify a chat session opens with a PR reference card showing number, title, verdict, risk, author, and link
4. Open a PR in review mode
5. Click the 'Discuss in chat' button
6. Verify review mode exits and a chat session opens with a PR reference card

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open the inbox and locate a PR awaiting review item
2. Click the 'Open in chat' action on the PR item
3. Verify a chat session opens with a PR reference card showing number, title, verdict, risk, author, and link
4. Open a PR in review mode
5. Click the 'Discuss in chat' button
6. Verify review mode exits and a chat session opens with a PR reference card

</details>
